headline: Citi Raises Seagate and Western Digital Targets as AI Data Demand Supercharges Storage Pricing
summary: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) stock and Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) stock are both trading higher Monday morning after Citi raised its price targets on both names, maintaining Buy ratings on each. The move adds to a wave of bullish analyst activity that’s been building across the storage sector over the past two weeks. Citi raised its Seagate ... Citi Raises Seagate and Western Digital Targets as AI Data Demand Supercharges Storage Pricing

headline: Seagate vs. Western Digital: Which HDD Leader Should Investors Pick?
summary: Western Digital edges past Seagate in the AI-driven storage boom, with stronger gains, lower valuation and robust capital returns despite ongoing risks.
